T1: NOTES Day 1: Students take notes on printmaking and watch safety video, to be re-watched at home with a parent/guardian.
Parent Signature: Watch the safety video with a parent and each sign the waiver from class. This is a completion grade and must be submitted in order to use carving linocut tools.
Notes Week 2: Complementary color pairs are listed for notes for Project 2, Self portrait patterned monoprint.

Series: Students use lino-cut tools to safely carve a design in linoleum. Block printing ink is used to print numerous prints and selection of the four best, most similar prints is made to submit for a grade.

SF Monoprint: Styrofoam monoprint.Each person painted on watercolor paper in analogous colors three to four colors around a central circle. A radial design was created through the printing of four of the same styrofoam design over the painted paper.
Quiz: Quiz is taken directly from the Notes in class. Any student earning less than a 90% in Art will take the Quiz the last day of Wheel.
